command_summary: pi --skill skills/design-craft --tools read,grep,find,ls --no-session -p with output redirected to /tmp/design-craft-pi-output.md

style_authority.note: Preserved the restrained enterprise console context and treated the job as next-hour triage.

reference_selection.note: Reported focused design-craft references relevant to dashboard critique and design moves.

anti_generic_redesign.note: Rejected equal card soup, decorative charting, and generic tips in favor of an operations surface.

evidence_level.note: Labeled evidence as L0 prompt-only and explicitly skipped browser/screenshot validation.

verified_boundary.note: Marked runtime, responsive, focus, state, token, and contrast claims as unverified.

design_moves.note: Proposed decision surface, diagnostic chart, task-first table, exception rail, and semantic color moves.

scope_control.note: Kept output to read-only critique and a validation plan without modifying files or broadening scope.
